response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is an experienced individual-contributor engineer with a solid polyglot background and some recent exposure to agentic tooling, but the gap between his current profile and the CTO role is fundamental: he has no demonstrated people-management or team-scaling experience, no executive or organizational leadership history, no track record operating in regulated financial environments, and his agentic AI work began only one month ago in a staff IC capacity. The role demands someone who has already navigated the full arc from hands-on architect to engineering executive at a fintech-scale company; Bogdan's resume shows none of that trajectory.
strengths: 16+ years of full-stack and systems engineering across microservices, distributed systems, and high-throughput environments (Dunnhumby: millions of req/sec)
Recent hands-on contribution to agentic AI infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, showing active orientation toward the problem space
Consistent record of technical craftsmanship — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development — and open-source contribution demonstrating engineering discipline
concerns: No evidence of people management, team scaling, or organizational leadership at any stage of career; every role is described as an individual contributor
Agentic AI experience is limited to one month at a single employer, with no production multi-agent systems at financial or operational scale
No fintech infrastructure depth (credit systems, payment flows, compliance/regulatory frameworks) and no board or executive-level communication history

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and high-throughput backend depth
